claims.claim: Conor McGregor's style is well-suited to disrupt Max Holloway's momentum.
claims.quote: I think Connor's style is good against Max, but with the layoff, with the inactivity, like it's very hard to compete with some of the best in the world

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's five-year layoff and inactivity make it difficult for him to compete at an elite level.
claims.quote: it's very hard to compete with some of the best in the world when you haven't fought in 5 years

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's previous leg injury significantly hinders his ability to compete.
claims.quote: coming off your leg getting snapped in half

claims.claim: Max Holloway will be too fast for Conor McGregor, causing McGregor to miss strikes he would have landed in his prime.
claims.quote: I think Max is going to be way too fast and Connor is going to miss these strikes where he would have landed them when he was at his prime.

claims.claim: Max Holloway will break Conor McGregor down over the course of the fight using his movement and combinations.
claims.quote: he's going to be able to land those combos going to the body, going to the head, and gradually breaking Connor down throughout the fight

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is physically capable of making the 155-pound weight limit.
claims.quote: I think he could still make 155. It's just the effort.

claims.claim: Arman Tsarukyan is a tougher fight for Justin Gaethje than a title defense.
claims.quote: Arman's a tougher fight.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is currently in great shape and weighs around 180 pounds.
claims.quote: He looks like he's around 180 right now. He doesn't look that big. We remember him from a few years ago where he was jacked and huge. He's gotten a lot smaller since then and he's in great shape.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor is physically capable of making the 155-pound weight limit.
claims.quote: I think Connor could still make 155. I mean, the reason why he's fighting at 170 is not because he can't cut the weight. It's because he just doesn't want to.

claims.claim: Dricus du Plessis has been focusing on his wrestling to prevent being controlled as he was against Khamzat Chimaev.
claims.quote: I think he's just been working on his wrestling so that never happens to him again.

claims.claim: Kamaru Usman will feel the effects of inactivity more than Dricus du Plessis due to his older age.
claims.quote: Usman's much older. I think he's going to feel more of the effects of being inactive than Drius.

claims.claim: Sean Strickland's wrestling has improved significantly since his previous fight with Dricus du Plessis.
claims.quote: I do think the trilogy between them is going to be a lot more favorable for Shawn Strickland because his wrestling has gotten so much better.

claims.claim: Kamaru Usman's striking speed has declined significantly compared to his prime.
claims.quote: his striking is looking a lot slower these days.

claims.claim: Mateusz Gamrot is a nightmare matchup for Shavkat Rakhmonov because he matches his size and is a better technical striker.
claims.quote: I think Proatez is a nightmare matchup for Morales. For someone who banks on his size and athleticism, fighting someone who matches the reach and height and hits harder, a better technical striker.

claims.claim: Mackenzie Dern is superior to Jillian Robertson in both grappling and striking power.
claims.quote: Duran's better everywhere. She's better on the ground. She has more power in her striking.

claims.claim: Mackenzie Dern is better than Jillian Robertson on the ground.
claims.quote: She's better on the ground.

claims.claim: Mackenzie Dern has more power in her striking than Jillian Robertson.
claims.quote: She has more power in her striking.

claims.claim: Jillian Robertson is on a five-fight win streak.
claims.quote: She's on a fiveight win streak.

claims.claim: Jamal Hill is on a three-fight loss streak.
claims.quote: He's on a three-ight loss streak.

claims.claim: Khalil Rountree defeated Jamal Hill over five rounds.
claims.quote: Didn't Roundtree whoop him for five rounds?

claims.claim: Dustin Jacoby is on a three-fight win streak consisting of all knockouts.
claims.quote: He's on a threeight win streak. All knockouts, too.

claims.claim: Jan Blachowicz's last definitive win was against Israel Adesanya in 2021.
claims.quote: His last like definitive win was Israel Adosana in 2021.

claims.claim: Brendan Allen has no wins against any currently ranked middleweight fighters.
claims.quote: Brennan Allen has no wins against anybody who is currently ranked, by the way.

claims.claim: Caio Borralho has wins over currently ranked fighters Jared Cannonier and Abus Magomedov.
claims.quote: Kaio, in fact, has two other wins that are currently ranked, which are Jared Cananeer and Abos Magomedov.

claims.claim: Jan Blachowicz's last definitive win was against Israel Adesanya in 2021.
claims.quote: His last like definitive win was Israel Adosana in 2021.

claims.claim: Brendan Allen has no wins against currently ranked middleweights.
claims.quote: Brennan Allen has no wins against anybody who is currently ranked, by the way.

claims.claim: Khamzat Chimaev's win over Robert Whittaker is a better win than any of Brendan Allen's.
claims.quote: I guess you know the Adosana win is bigger than any of Allen's.

claims.claim: Ikram Aliskerov should not be ranked above Jared Cannonier because Cannonier has a win against a current top-10 ranked fighter.
claims.quote: I don't think I'd put Ekramiskov above uh Jerk Kner because Kaneir has a win against someone who's ranked right now in the top 10.

claims.claim: Paulo Costa's last win streak occurred in 2019.
claims.quote: The last time Polo Koso was on a win streak was back in 2019.

claims.claim: Ian Garry should be ranked above Carlos Prates because Garry defeated him.
claims.quote: Carl's Protesz is number one above Ian Gary even though Gary beat him. You got to have Gary at number one.

claims.claim: Gabriel Bonfim should be ranked above Sean Brady because Bonfim defeated Trevin Giles more decisively than JDM did.
claims.quote: I think Bunfam should be above Brady because he beat Bal as well. He beat Bal even easier than JDM did.

claims.claim: Kamaru Usman should be ranked above Joaquin Buckley because Usman is coming off a win and Buckley is on a two-fight losing streak.
claims.quote: Buckley has even won in two fights, two loss streak and one of that was to Usman. Usman's coming off a win and that is Buckley.

claims.claim: Dan Hooker should be ranked above Mateusz Gamrot because Hooker defeated Gamrot less than two years ago.
claims.quote: He beat Matu Gamro not even two years ago and he's number six. Hooker's at number 11.

claims.claim: Aljamain Sterling should be ranked above Lerone Murphy because Sterling is coming off a win against Youssef Zalal, who is a higher-quality opponent than Murphy's recent wins.
claims.quote: Elmaine beat Ysef Zal who's better than all of those guys.

claims.claim: Rani Yahya is on a five-fight win streak, the best of his UFC career.
claims.quote: at almost 40, he's on a fiveight win streak. The best win streak of his UFC career.

claims.claim: Deiveson Figueiredo has lost four of his last five fights.
claims.quote: Davidson's lost 20 times. He's one and four in his last five fights.

claims.claim: Hony Barcelos is on a five-fight win streak, the best of his UFC career.
claims.quote: he's on a fiveight win streak. The best win streak of his UFC career.

claims.claim: Kevin Borhas has a two-loss streak prior to his recent win against Andre Lima.
claims.quote: Two loss streak prior to that.

claims.claim: Jamal Hill does not cut much weight and carries excess fat.
claims.quote: Hill doesn't look like he cuts that much weight. He's got so much like excess fat.

claims.claim: Sergey Pavlovich possesses power that Jamal Hill has never felt before.
claims.quote: Hill is going to get blasted by power he's never felt before.

claims.claim: Alex Pereira has been given favorable matchups against strikers rather than high-level wrestlers.
claims.quote: Alex Pereira has been given favorable matchups. He hasn't fought the wrestler

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria needs to stop leaning away from strikes to avoid eating jabs.
claims.quote: He can't be leaning away like he did in the first. He ate a bunch of jabs because of that.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria's habit of pulling his hips away to defend takedowns caused him to lean into Justin Gaethje's uppercut.
claims.quote: he pulled his hips away and that caused him to lean forward into the uppercut

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria needs to move his head more to avoid Justin Gaethje's strikes.
claims.quote: he's got to move his head more.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria's habit of leaning away from leg kicks put him in the center line for Justin Gaethje's jab.
claims.quote: He was expecting leg kicks and he wanted to keep his front leg light, but because of that, he put himself in the center line a lot easier for Justin to jab him in the face.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria's tendency to pull his hips away from takedown threats caused him to lean into Justin Gaethje's uppercuts.
claims.quote: He pulled his hips away and that caused him to lean forward into the uppercut and that's what damaged his eyes.

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje has not adjusted to body shots since the Eddie Alvarez fight.
claims.quote: Justin hasn't really adjusted to it too well since the Eddie Alvarez fight many years ago. Same exact weakness.

claims.claim: Alex Pereira's confusion by Ciryl Gane's movement was a greater issue than his speed in their fight.
claims.quote: I honestly don't think his speed was necessarily as much of an issue as much as he was confused by Gan's movement.

claims.claim: Josh Hoker has poor cardio.
claims.quote: Hokit seems to have bad cardio

claims.claim: Josh Hoker is a good wrestler and is very fast.
claims.quote: he is a good wrestler. He is very fast.

claims.claim: Sergei Pavlovich has an 84-inch reach.
claims.quote: he has a 84 inch reach.

claims.claim: Heavyweight fighters hit harder than Alex Pereira.
claims.quote: the power seems to be a lot more equaled out in the heavyweight division. If not, these guys hit harder than Alex.

claims.claim: Training at a smaller gym limits a fighter's access to high-level training partners.
claims.quote: The biggest issues about training at a smaller gym is that you don't have enough guys who are on your level.

claims.claim: Charles Oliveira is the third greatest lightweight of all time.
claims.quote: Charles is the third greatest lightweight of all time

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje is the fourth greatest lightweight of all time.
claims.quote: Gachi's fourth. I think Gachi clearly is number four now.

claims.claim: Ciryl Gane is a consistently dirty fighter who frequently commits fouls like eye pokes, low blows, and fence grabbing.
claims.quote: Is it safe to say Gan may be one of the most consistently dirty fighters we've seen this era? ... He's poking nice eyes. He's lowblowing, grabbing the fence against Volov.

claims.claim: Ciryl Gane has never had a point deducted in the UFC.
claims.quote: Sirill gone has never had a point deduction in the UFC.

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje has aged better than Charles Oliveira because his durability remains high and he has integrated his wrestling and striking more effectively.
claims.quote: I would probably say Justin Gachi just because his durability is still there, like he's taking shots well. He's using his wrestling better than he's ever used it before.

claims.claim: Charles Oliveira possesses more power in his hands than Justin Gaethje.
claims.quote: That's how powerful Charles Olivera is. I mean even when he hit Max, he was like rattling him with his shots. This guy still has immense power in his hands.

claims.claim: Charles Oliveira is physically stronger than Justin Gaethje in the clinch.
claims.quote: Charles is physically very very strong. Like those body lock takedowns are no joke.

claims.claim: Dustin Poirier's calf kicks would be less effective against Ilia Topuria than they were against Conor McGregor.
claims.quote: Ilia knows what they are. So, it wouldn't be as effective against Ilia.

claims.claim: Khabib Nurmagomedov dominated Justin Gaethje in their fight without taking significant damage.
claims.quote: Hhabib, on the other hand, not even a scratch. And he fairly dominated the fight.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria does not require surgery for his orbital fractures sustained against Gaethje.
claims.quote: he doesn't require surgery for the orbital fractures

claims.claim: Khabib Nurmagomedov's durability was exceptional, allowing him to absorb Gaethje's biggest punches and leg kicks without being deterred.
claims.quote: He walked Gachi down the entire time, took some of his biggest punches, big leg kicks, and never deterred.

claims.claim: Arman Tsarukyan possesses superior ground-and-pound skills compared to current fighters, specifically using elbows and punches from full guard.
claims.quote: Ferocious ground and pound that we don't see that much anymore. We don't see guys like from the full guard absolutely smash their face with elbows and punches the way Armen does now.

claims.claim: Khabib Nurmagomedov is more effective at wrestling against the cage than Arman Tsarukyan.
claims.quote: Armen is very good at wrestling, especially in the center of the octagon. Hhabib I think is better against the cage though.

claims.claim: Kamaru Usman's size and reach advantage make him one of the toughest stylistic matchups for Khabib Nurmagomedov.
claims.quote: I've always said this is like one of the toughest fights for Hhabib. I'd probably pick a prime Usman. He's bigger. He's got a much longer reach.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has poor defensive striking skills.
claims.quote: BSD has really bad defense.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria's mental state is a significant question mark following his loss to Justin Gaethje.
claims.quote: there is some question to Ilia's mental after the Gachi loss.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria's mental state is questionable following his loss to Justin Gaethje.
claims.quote: there is some question to Ilia's mental after the Gachi loss.

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje is currently using his offensive wrestling more intelligently than at any previous point in his career.
claims.quote: he's actually using his wrestling offensively, whereas before he didn't like to go to it. He's embracing his wrestling and using it a lot more intelligently than he's ever done before.

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje's athleticism has declined compared to his earlier fights against Tony Ferguson, Khabib Nurmagomedov, Charles Oliveira, and Dustin Poirier.
claims.quote: I don't know if he's athletically as good as he used to be.

claims.claim: Ciryl Gane's jab is elite and superior to Tom Aspinall's head movement.
claims.quote: Gan's jab is just elite. Like Ganon could probably throw the jab at half speed and Tom won't dodge it.

claims.claim: Ciryl Gane's chances of winning against Tom Aspinall increase as the fight progresses into later rounds.
claims.quote: the further the fight goes into the rounds, the better Gan's chances are.

claims.claim: Alexander Volkanovski cannot handle Justin Gaethje's power in a potential matchup.
claims.quote: Vulk just can't handle that power.

claims.claim: Patty Pimblett possesses an elite chin that allows him to absorb significant punches.
claims.quote: The only reason why Patty stayed in that fight is because he's got an insane chin.

claims.claim: Arman Tsarukyan has a favorable stylistic matchup to defeat Justin Gaethje.
claims.quote: I think he has a good style to beat Gai

claims.claim: Alex Pereira is faster and performs better at his natural weight of 230-235 pounds compared to 251 pounds.
claims.quote: If Alex was at 230 to 235, he'd have a better chance because he's at his natural weight. He's going to be faster.

claims.claim: Ciryl Gane is a better fighter than Alex Pereira and would win a rematch regardless of Pereira's weight.
claims.quote: I don't think he would beat him in a rematch. I think Gan is just better.

claims.claim: Diego Lopez struggles against fighters who move to his right.
claims.quote: we know Lopez is not good when fighters are moving to his right.

claims.claim: Diego Lopez is a better striker and has better form than Paddy Pimblet.
claims.quote: I think he's just a better striker. He has better form with his punches

claims.claim: Diego Lopez has better cardio and a better chin than Benoit Saint-Denis.
claims.quote: Lopez might have better cardio though, and he might have a better chin.

claims.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has been hurt multiple times in fights.
claims.quote: I've seen BSD get hurt multiple times in fights

claims.claim: Max Holloway's movement and striking skill are too vast for Diego Lopez to overcome.
claims.quote: there is where I think the skill difference is just way too vast. I think Max is too good in the stand up, way too good of movement.

claims.claim: Arman Tsarukyan is the best lightweight fighter currently.
claims.quote: I think the best lightweight is Armenyukin.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria would be dominant at featherweight because the division is smaller and he has already beaten the champion.
claims.quote: I do think Ilia would be dominant at featherweight. The 145ers are not as big and he already has a win against the champion.

claims.claim: Donald Cerrone is a slow starter.
claims.quote: Cerrone is a slow starter.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria must be defensively minded on his exits because he has to get very close to land his shots.
claims.quote: Ilia just has to be very defensively minded on his exits because he has to get very close to landing shots.

claims.claim: Lopez is most dangerous when he counters on the exit of exchanges.
claims.quote: I think is when Lopez is most dangerous with when he counters in that fight.

claims.claim: Eddie Hall lacks the skill and cardio to compete with UFC champions.
claims.quote: he has no skill, no cardio for it.

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje's durability is often underestimated by fans and analysts.
claims.quote: I think more so underestimating Gachi's durability.

claims.claim: Charles Oliveira's chin is not very reliable as he has been dropped in half of his fights.
claims.quote: Charles has been dropped in half the fights he's competed in. His chin, while not terrible, isn't very reliable either.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria showed major signs of fatigue in the third round of his fight against Josh Emmett.
claims.quote: he showed major signs of fatigue going into round three.

claims.claim: Justin Gaethje fought four rounds against Max Holloway with a broken nose.
claims.quote: He fought four rounds with a broken nose.

claims.claim: Kelvin Gastelum had more ferocious knockout power at middleweight than he did at welterweight.
claims.quote: At welterweight you always had some power, but he didn't like deliver with the same type of knockdowns and knockouts that he did at 185.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria was unable to finish Youssef Zalal and went to a decision.
claims.quote: He has Zal with some clean shots and wasn't able to put him away. Went to a decision with him.

claims.claim: Conor McGregor's sparring partners are not at a high enough level to accurately simulate elite competition.
claims.quote: we see his sparring and he's going up against guys who are not on his level at all.

claims.claim: Ilia Topuria intentionally curates his public sparring footage to only show himself performing well.
claims.quote: Ilia is all about making himself look good before the fight. So, he's not going to put any sparring out there of him losing.

claims.claim: The atmosphere of the Freedom 250 event provided a mental edge to Justin that contributed to his victory.
claims.quote: I think some of it helped him but not totally.

claims.claim: The dominant style of Caucasus-based fighters is being neutralized as the rest of the sport improves and adapts.
claims.quote: Everybody improves and catches up. You know, at one point it was jiu-jitsu... Then it was wrestlers who knew jiu-jitsu... Like the styles always change.
